beforeAfter.subtitle: Our lash lifts provide a stunning yet natural enhancement. Witness the difference!

servicesOverview.subtitle: Choose the perfect lash lift experience tailored to your desires.

withTint.title: Lash Lift with Tint
withTint.description: Achieve beautifully lifted lashes with an added touch of color for extra definition and depth. Wake up ready!

withoutTint.title: Lash Lift (No Tint)
withoutTint.description: Enjoy perfectly curled lashes that enhance your natural beauty, giving your eyes a more open and awake look.

whyLashLifting.subtitle: Experience the numerous benefits of a professional lash lift at LashLift by Jenni.
whyLashLifting.imageAlt: Close-up of perfectly lifted natural lashes

naturalLook.title: Stunning Natural Look
naturalLook.description: Enhances your own lashes for a beautiful, natural curl without extensions.

longLasting.title: Long-Lasting Results
longLasting.description: Enjoy your gorgeous lifted lashes for 6-8 weeks with proper care.

lowMaintenance.title: Low Maintenance
lowMaintenance.description: Wake up with perfect lashes every day. No mascara needed (unless you want extra drama!).

safeGentle.title: Safe & Gentle
safeGentle.description: Our techniques and products are chosen for their safety and gentleness on your natural lashes.

ctaHome.title: Ready for Your Lash Transformation?
ctaHome.subtitle: Book your appointment today and let Jenni work her magic on your lashes. Experience the confidence of naturally beautiful eyes!

aboutPage.subtitle: Passionate about enhancing natural beauty, one lash lift at a time.
aboutPage.ownerImageAlt: Portrait of Jenni, the lash artist

story.title: My Journey into Lash Artistry
story.paragraph1: Hello! I'm Jenni, the heart and hands behind LashLift by Jenni. My passion for beauty and meticulous attention to detail led me to the art of lash lifting. I believe that true beauty shines from within, and my goal is to enhance your natural features, making you feel confident and radiant.
story.paragraph2: Based in the vibrant city of Antwerp, I've dedicated myself to mastering the techniques that deliver stunning, natural-looking results. Each treatment is performed with utmost care, precision, and a personal touch.
story.paragraph3: I love connecting with my clients, understanding their desires, and seeing their joy when they see their transformed lashes. It's more than just a treatment; it's an experience of self-care and enhancement.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: To enhance natural beauty with care and precision, providing a relaxing and uplifting experience that leaves you feeling confident and beautiful.

care.title: Personalized Care
care.description: Every client is unique. I take the time to understand your needs and tailor the service for the best results.

precision.title: Meticulous Precision
precision.description: Lash lifting is an art. I focus on every detail to ensure a flawless, beautiful lift every time.

passion.title: Genuine Passion
passion.description: I truly love what I do, and this passion reflects in the quality of my work and client experience.

studio.title: My Cozy Studio
studio.image1Alt: Interior of LashLift by Jenni studio
studio.caption: A calm and inviting space designed for your comfort and relaxation.

servicesPage.mainSubtitle: Indulge in our specialized lash lifting treatments designed to give you effortlessly beautiful lashes.

withTint.title: Lash Lift with Tint
withTint.description: The ultimate lash transformation! This service lifts your natural lashes from the root, creating the illusion of length and volume, and then adds a custom tint to darken your lashes. Perfect for those who want a mascara-like effect without the daily hassle.
benefits: Lashes appear longer, fuller, and darker
Eyes look more open and defined
withTint.image1Alt: Before and after lash lift with tint - example 1
withTint.image1Desc: Lashes before are straight, after are lifted and tinted dark.
withTint.image2Alt: Before and after lash lift with tint - example 2
withTint.image2Desc: Another example of lashes transformed with lift and tint.

withoutTint.title: Lash Lift (No Tint)
withoutTint.description: This service beautifully lifts and curls your natural lashes from the root, giving them a longer, fuller appearance. Ideal for those who have naturally dark lashes or prefer a more subtle enhancement without added color.
benefits: Enhances natural lash curl and lift
Makes eyes appear larger and more awake
Perfect for a 'your lashes but better' look
Great for those sensitive to tints
withoutTint.image1Alt: Before and after lash lift without tint - example 1
withoutTint.image1Desc: Lashes before are less curled, after are perfectly lifted.
withoutTint.image2Alt: Before and after lash lift without tint - example 2
withoutTint.image2Desc: Subtle yet impactful lift without tint.

cta.title: Ready for Flawless Lashes?
cta.subtitle: Treat yourself to a lash lift and wake up every day with perfectly curled, beautiful lashes. Book your appointment with Jenni today!

bookingPage.subtitle: I'm excited to welcome you! Please fill out the form below to request your preferred date and time. I'll get back to you shortly to confirm.
